messages: You made it through today—and that already counts as a win.
Even small steps forward matter more than standing still.
It’s okay to feel everything. You’re still moving forward.
You’re doing better than you think, even if it doesn’t feel like it.
One hard day doesn’t erase all your progress.
Rest if you need to—but don’t give up on yourself.
Your effort matters, even when no one else sees it.
You survived today. That’s strength, not weakness.
Growth is messy. You’re allowed to figure things out slowly.
You’re not alone in feeling this way—and it will pass.
quotes: You don’t have to have it all figured out to move forward.
Feelings are temporary, but strength is built through them.
You are allowed to outgrow what once hurt you.
Your current situation is not your final destination.
It’s okay to slow down. Just don’t stop.
You’ve overcome so much already—don’t forget that.
Sometimes surviving is the bravest thing you can do.

verses.text: Do not be anxious about anything… and the peace of God… will guard your hearts and your minds.
The Lord is close to the brokenhearted and saves those who are crushed in spirit.
Come to me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest.
Do not fear, for I am with you… I will strengthen you and help you.
Cast your cares on the Lord and he will sustain you.
My grace is sufficient for you, for my power is made perfect in weakness.
Peace I leave with you; my peace I give you… Do not let your hearts be troubled.
His mercies never come to an end; they are new every morning.
The pain you’ve been feeling can’t compare to the joy that is coming.
Be strong and courageous… for the Lord your God will be with you wherever you go.
